rows.description: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect
rows.notes: Header row is clearly distinct in the image and contains no monetary amounts. Selected gemini-flash's accurate segmentation and transcription for this header. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this header with the first entry row and assigned amounts to it, resulting in an incorrect description and row type for what should have been two separate ledger entries.
rows.section_header: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect

rows.notes: Monetary values (pounds, shillings, pence, fraction) are identical between both extractors and clearly visible in the image. The description 'pag: 49' is visually confirmed, incorporating the colon missed by gemini-flash and correcting gpt-5-mini's merged and mis-transcribed description.
rows.section_header: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts brought forward from page 49, amounting to £237 19s 5 1/4d.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description, row type, and all monetary values, which are clearly visible in the image. The notes from both models accurately explain the handling of the leading zero in pounds and the fraction. Consensus achieved.
rows.section_header: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts brought forward from page 50, amounting to £87 3s 11 1/2d.

rows.notes: Pounds, shillings, and pence values are consistent between extractors and clearly visible. Visual inspection confirms the description is 'P: 51' (overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Do: 51') and the fraction is '1/2' or 0.5 (overriding gpt-5-mini's 0.25 interpretation of a 'small tail').
rows.section_header: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts brought forward from page 51, amounting to £308 8s 9 1/2d.

rows.notes: Monetary values are consistent between extractors and clearly visible. Visual inspection confirms the description is 'P: 52' (overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Do: 52'). Both correctly identified no fraction.
rows.section_header: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts brought forward from page 52, amounting to £25 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Shillings, pence, and fraction are consistent and clear between extractors. Visual inspection confirms the description is 'P: 53' (overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Do: 53'). For pounds, '1468' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's '1460', as the last digit clearly appears to be an '8' with a distinct closed loop.
rows.section_header: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts brought forward from page 53, amounting to £1468 8s 11 1/4d.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the empty description, row type, and all monetary values, which are clearly visible in the image. Consensus achieved.
rows.section_header: Recepta pr hoc anno vd: lib: Rect

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the total row type, description, and monetary values. The row is clearly indicated as a summation line by the pound sign and underlining in the image. Consensus achieved.
